faqs.question: Why are mosquitoes so prevalent in Morningside Heights?
faqs.answer: Morningside Heights' proximity to both Riverside Park and Morningside Park, combined with shaded courtyards, rooftop gardens, and numerous green spaces around Columbia University, creates ideal mosquito breeding habitats. Standing water in planters, catch basins, and tree canopies provides perfect conditions for mosquito larvae to develop throughout the warmer months.
